title: Percy Jackson and Friends!
description: A Percy Jackson mod that adds weapons and minerals from the books.
body:
Embark on an epic Minecraft adventure with the Percy Jackson and Friends! mod, inspired by Rick Riordan’s Percy Jackson book series! This mod introduces a plethora of mythological weapons and tools wielded by iconic demigods, and gods, such as Riptide and many more, along with unique mechanics to bring the world of Greek and Roman mythology to life.


	This mod transforms Minecraft into a mythological battleground, perfect for Percy Jackson fans and Minecraft adventurers alike. Wield the power of the gods and decide your fate—will you rise as a hero or succumb to the trials of the ancient world?
    

**_This mod is based on a book series made by Rick Riordan._**
